name: Crispy Baked Onion Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each onion into 4 thick slices; separate into rings, reserving small rings for other uses.
2. Set aside.
3. Combine the corn-flakes cereal and the next three ingredients; divide in half.
4. Beat the egg substitute at high speed with an electric mixer until soft peaks form.
5. Dip half of the onion rings in the egg substitute.
6. Dredge in half of the crumb mixture.
7. Place in a single layer on baking sheets coated with cooking spray.
8. Repeat the procedure with the remaining onion rings and crumb mixture.
9. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes or until crisp.
10. Serve warm. Yield: 4 servings (254 calories per serving).
